g.text: THE TRINITY — THREE PREDICTIONS, THREE FLAT RECORDINGS
force, acceleration, sound — three independent physical channels, three empty traces
peak load on the victim's torso
one bruise, right shoulder — no rib fx
one-arm pull, no run-up, no traction
peak SPL at the phone microphone
70 kg body into a hollow steel panel, 2 m
phone was on, recording was running, waveform flat
three predictions — three independent physical channels — zero of them in the record
